{{Infobox character
| name = Grace
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Truegold
| affiliations = Lindon's team
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Grace Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Grace is a character who possesses purple eyes and engages in combat using a [[sword]]. During battle, she is supported by her cousins, Douji and [[Courage]], as well as [[Naru Saeya]]. In social or political contexts, Grace is viewed by others as someone who identifies potential allies based on whether they are acceptable to her family and if she can maintain a good relationship with them. She has been involved in discussions regarding future alliances, having initiated topics concerning her personal connections and potential ties to others.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Truegold]] of non-prominent clan origin, Grace possesses a [[void key]] and is the cousin of Douji and [[Courage]]. While finishing her training as an acolyte, she utilizes a long, curved [[steel]] [[sword]] retrieved from her [[soulspace]]. Although she is a member of [[Lindon]]'s team who has performed well in combat, her [[sacred instrument]] has begun to weaken and occasionally suffers from activation delays. During her time with the group, she is noted for having a cloth wrapped around her missing eye.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] is a [[Truegold]] who is not from a prominent clan.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] is finishing up acolytes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] uses a long, curved [[steel]] [[sword]] that she pulls from her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]]'s [[sacred instrument]] is getting weaker and sometimes takes a moment to activate.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] is a member of [[Lindon]]'s team and has performed well in combat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] had a cloth wrapped around a missing eye.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] is a former team member of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Grace]] is a cousin of Douji and [[Courage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
